Off Calendar Apr-12-2023 Continued To Jul-12-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion to set default prove-up hearing.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 09:26:48 a.m. and concluding at 09:32:44 a.m.

Plaintiff Arch Insurance Company represented by Jeffrey K. Jayson, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Wanda Debris Box corp. not appearing.

Plaintiff has no witnesses and request to proceed via declarations.
Court requires testimony of the insurance adjuster as a witness and they must appear at the next hearing. Plaintiff's request to proceed via declarations is DENIED.

Court is unclear on the amount requested by Plaintiff.
Plaintiff did not identify an amount in its Prayer for Relief in its Complaint.
There are two inconsistent amounts identified in its complaint and amounts are not clearly stated.

Plaintiff is ordered to file and serve Defendant with Statement of Damages forthwith.
Court orders matter continued to Jul-12-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 505 for receipt and service of statement of damages, the appearance of insurance adjuster as a witness, and further hearing.
